allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/ -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "status=$\($r.StatusCode\) size=$\($r.Content.Length\) hasH1=$\($r.Content -match 'Hayabusa System Architecture'\) hasCanvas=$\($r.Content -match 'zoom-container'\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; "status=$\($r.StatusCode\); hasH1=$\($r.Content -match 'Hayabusa System Architecture'\); hasSvg=$\($r.Content -match '<svg'\); hasSnowflakeDb=$\($r.Content -match 'Snowflake'\); hasMockSchema=$\($r.Content -match '>RAW<'\)")
PowerShell(Measure-Command { try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 400 | Out-Null } catch { $_ | Out-Null } } | Select TotalSeconds)
